metadata.summary: Jupyter widget for interactive graph visualization

documentation:
# landscape-widget

`landscape-widget` is part of [Cobalt](https://cobalt.bluelightai.com), a toolkit for
illuminating and improving AI models and datasets.

Visit our website at [bluelightai.com](https://bluelightai.com).

modules.name: landscape_widget.tests.test_nbextension_path
documentation: Tests for magic functions needed by notebook server.

modules.name: landscape_widget.tests.conftest
documentation: Mocks and fixtures for tests.

classes.name: landscape_widget.tests.conftest.MockComm
documentation:
A mock Comm object.

Can be used to inspect calls to Comm's open/send/close methods.

modules.name: landscape_widget
documentation: Jupyter notebook widget for interactive graph visualization.

functions.name: landscape_widget._jupyter_labextension_paths
documentation:
Called by Jupyter Lab Server to detect if it is a valid labextension and
to install the widget
Returns
=======
src: Source directory name to copy files from. Webpack outputs generated files
    into this directory and Jupyter Lab copies from this directory during
    widget installation
dest: Destination directory name to install widget files to. Jupyter Lab copies
    from `src` directory into <jupyter path>/labextensions/<dest> directory
    during widget installation

functions.name: landscape_widget._jupyter_nbextension_paths
documentation:
Called by Jupyter Notebook Server to detect if it is a valid nbextension and
to install the widget
Returns
=======
section: The section of the Jupyter Notebook Server to change.
    Must be 'notebook' for widget extensions
src: Source directory name to copy files from. Webpack outputs generated files
    into this directory and Jupyter Notebook copies from this directory during
    widget installation
dest: Destination directory name to install widget files to. Jupyter Notebook copies
    from `src` directory into <jupyter path>/nbextensions/<dest> directory
    during widget installation
require: Path to importable AMD Javascript module inside the
    <jupyter path>/nbextensions/<dest> directory

modules.name: landscape_widget.landscape
documentation: An interactive graph rendering widget for Jupyter notebooks.
Copyright (C) 2023-2024 BlueLightAI, Inc. All Rights Reserved.
Any use, distribution, or modification of this software is subject to the
terms of the BlueLightAI Software License Agreement.

classes.name: landscape_widget.landscape.Landscape

methods.name: landscape_widget.landscape.Landscape.use_selection_listeners
documentation:
Sets up a context in which selection listeners are active or inactive
based on the call_listeners parameter.

methods.name: landscape_widget.landscape.Landscape.on_select_points
documentation:
Add a function to be run when the user selects nodes in the graph.

The callback function must take a single argument of type list[int],
which contains the ids of the selected data points. Whenever the set of
selected nodes changes, this function will be called. Any return value
will be ignored.

Returns an id which can be used to remove a listener function by calling
remove_node_select_listener().

methods.name: landscape_widget.landscape.Landscape.remove_point_selection_listener
documentation: Remove a listener previously added using on_select()

methods.name: landscape_widget.landscape.Landscape.clear_selection
documentation:
Clears the currently selected nodes and points.

Note that this will trigger any registered listeners (unless called with
the use_selection_listeners(False) context manager).

methods.name: landscape_widget.landscape.Landscape.dispose_graph
documentation: Send a custom message to the frontend to trigger graph update.
An interactive graph visualization.
